questions.question: Dry skin wali bride ke liye makeup se pehle kaun sa step sabse important hai?

options.B: Matte Primer Application

questions.explanation: Dry skin ko makeup ke liye prepare karne ke liye intensive moisturizing sabse zaroori hai, taaki makeup patchy na lage aur skin hydrated dikhe.

questions.question: Oily skin tone wali bride ke liye foundation choose karte samay aap kis finish ko prefer karenge?

options.B: Matte finish

questions.explanation: Oily skin ke liye matte finish foundation best rehta hai, kyunki yeh excess oil ko control karta hai aur shine ko minimize karta hai.

questions.question: Agar bride ki skin par redness (lalipan) hai, toh use neutralize karne ke liye kaun sa color corrector use karna chahiye?

options.B: Yellow

questions.explanation: Redness ko neutralize karne ke liye green color corrector use kiya jaata hai, kyunki green red ka opposite color wheel par hota hai.

questions.question: Makeup application se pehle skin ko tone karna kyu zaroori hai?

options.A: Skin ko dry karne ke liye
options.B: Pores ko minimize karne aur pH balance maintain karne ke liye
options.C: Foundation ko smoothly blend karne ke liye
options.D: Chehre par glow add karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Toning se pores minimize hote hain aur skin ka natural pH balance maintain rehta hai, jo makeup ke liye ek smooth base provide karta hai.

questions.question: Aap bride ke undertone ko kaise determine karenge foundation selection ke liye?

options.A: Uske kapdon ka color dekh kar
options.B: Uske hair color se match karke
options.C: Uske veins ka color aur jewellery preference dekh kar
options.D: Uske nails ka color dekh kar

questions.explanation: Veins ka color (blue/purple for cool, green for warm) aur silver/gold jewellery preference (silver for cool, gold for warm) undertone determine karne mein madad karte hain.

questions.question: Ek bride ko long-lasting makeup ke liye aap kaun sa primer recommend karenge, agar uski skin combination hai?

options.B: Pore-filling primer T-zone par aur hydrating primer dry areas par

questions.explanation: Combination skin ke liye, T-zone par pore-filling/mattifying primer aur dry areas par hydrating primer use karna best hai, taaki har area ki specific need address ho sake aur makeup long-lasting rahe.

questions.question: Hyperpigmentation (dark spots) wali skin ke liye kaun sa color corrector sabse effective hoga?

options.B: Pink/Peach/Orange

questions.explanation: Hyperpigmentation aur dark spots ko conceal karne ke liye skin tone ke according pink, peach ya orange corrector use kiya jaata hai, jo dark areas ko brighten karta hai.

questions.question: Sensitivity prone skin wali bride ke liye aap kaun se ingredients avoid karenge pre-makeup products mein?

options.B: Fragrance aur Alcohol

questions.explanation: Sensitive skin ke liye fragrance aur alcohol wale products avoid karne chahiye, kyunki yeh irritation cause kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Foundation apply karne ka best method kya hai for a seamless, natural finish?

options.B: Damp beauty blender se dab dab karke
options.C: Flat foundation brush se strokes mein

questions.explanation: Damp beauty blender se dabbing motion mein foundation apply karne se ek seamless aur natural finish milta hai, aur product skin mein ache se blend hota hai.

questions.question: Agar bride ki skin par open pores hain, toh aap kaun sa product use karna prefer karenge pores ko blur karne ke liye?

options.B: Pore-filling primer

questions.explanation: Pore-filling primer specifically designed hote hain open pores ko blur karne aur skin ko smooth base dene ke liye.

questions.question: Bridal makeup mein skin ki hydration maintain rakhne ke liye kaun sa product end mein use karna chahiye?

options.B: Setting spray

questions.explanation: Setting spray makeup ko set karne ke saath-saath skin ki hydration maintain karta hai aur cakey appearance ko prevent karta hai.

questions.question: Mature skin wali bride ke liye foundation lagate samay kis baat ka dhyaan rakhna chahiye?

options.A: Heavy, full coverage foundation use karna
options.B: Light to medium coverage, hydrating foundation use karna

questions.explanation: Mature skin par light to medium coverage aur hydrating foundation use karna chahiye, taaki fine lines aur wrinkles accentuate na ho.

questions.question: Patch test kya hota hai aur bridal makeup se pehle yeh kyu zaroori hai?

options.A: Makeup artist ki skills test karne ke liye
options.B: Bride ke favorite colors check karne ke liye
options.C: Kisi product se allergic reaction check karne ke liye
options.D: Foundation shade match karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Patch test kisi product se hone wale allergic reaction ko pehchanne ke liye kiya jaata hai, jo bridal makeup mein skin sensitivity se bachne ke liye crucial hai.

questions.question: Agar bride ki skin uneven texture wali hai, toh aap foundation application se pehle kaun sa step suggest karenge?

options.B: Extra layer of setting powder

questions.explanation: Uneven texture ko improve karne ke liye gentle exfoliation aur smoothing primer ka use karna chahiye, taaki foundation smooth dikhe.

questions.question: Dark circles ko conceal karne ke liye, correct technique kya hai?

options.B: Orange/peach corrector followed by a concealer matching skin tone

questions.explanation: Dark circles ko effectively conceal karne ke liye, pehle orange/peach corrector se darkness neutralize karte hain, phir skin tone matching concealer lagate hain.

questions.question: Bridal makeup mein waterproof products ka use kyu important hai?

options.B: Tears, sweat aur humidity se makeup ko bachane ke liye
options.C: Makeup ko jaldi remove karne ke liye
options.D: Sirf photos mein acha dikhne ke liye

questions.explanation: Bridal makeup mein waterproof products tears, sweat aur humidity se makeup ko intact rakhte hain, ensuring it lasts throughout the event.

questions.question: Sunscreen ko makeup se pehle apply karna kyu zaroori hai, especially daytime events ke liye?

options.A: Makeup ko smooth banane ke liye
options.B: Skin ko UV rays se protect karne ke liye
options.C: Foundation ka color change karne ke liye
options.D: Pores ko minimize karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Sunscreen skin ko harmful UV rays se protect karta hai, jo outdoor ya daytime bridal events ke liye essential hai.

questions.question: Cream contouring powder contouring se kaise alag hai?

options.A: Cream contouring sirf oily skin ke liye hai
options.B: Cream contouring zyada natural finish deta hai aur dry skin ke liye better hai
options.C: Powder contouring zyada long-lasting hota hai
options.D: Cream contouring sirf night events ke liye hai

questions.explanation: Cream contouring dry skin ke liye better hota hai aur zyada natural, seamless finish deta hai, jabki powder contouring oily skin ke liye acha hota hai aur zyada defined look deta hai.

questions.question: Cut crease eye makeup look mein, crease ko define karne ke liye kaun sa product use hota hai?

options.B: Concealer

questions.explanation: Cut crease mein, crease line ko concealer se clean aur sharp banaya jaata hai, jisse ek defined 'cut' effect milta hai.

questions.question: Airbrush makeup ke kya fayde hain bridal makeup ke liye?

options.B: Flawless, lightweight aur long-lasting finish deta hai

questions.explanation: Airbrush makeup ek flawless, lightweight aur long-lasting finish deta hai, jo bridal makeup ke liye ideal hai kyunki yeh photo-friendly bhi hota hai.

questions.question: Smokey eye look create karte samay, sabse light shade kahan apply kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Inner corner and brow bone

questions.explanation: Smokey eye mein, inner corner aur brow bone par light shade apply kiya jaata hai highlight karne ke liye, jo eye ko open aur bright dikhata hai.

questions.question: Ombre lip effect achieve karne ke liye, aap kaun se shades use karenge?

options.B: Ek hi color family ke do ya teen shades

questions.explanation: Ombre lip ke liye, ek hi color family ke do ya teen shades use kiye jaate hain, jismein darker shade outer edges par aur lighter shade center par hota hai, seamlessly blended.

questions.question: Individual eyelashes strip lashes se kaise better ho sakte hain bridal makeup ke liye?

options.B: Zyada natural aur customizable hote hain
options.C: Lagane mein bahut easy hote hain
options.D: Sirf ek hi size mein available hote hain

questions.explanation: Individual lashes strip lashes se zyada natural aur customizable look dete hain, jo bride ki eye shape aur preference ke according adjust kiye ja sakte hain.

questions.question: Agar bride ki eyes small hain, toh unhe bada dikhane ke liye kaun si eye makeup technique use karenge?

options.A: Heavy black eyeliner all around the eye
options.B: Inner corner par light shimmer aur waterline par nude/white kohl pencil

questions.explanation: Small eyes ko bada dikhane ke liye, inner corner par light shimmer apply karte hain aur waterline par nude ya white kohl pencil use karte hain, jo eyes ko open up karta hai.

questions.question: Liquid highlighter powder highlighter se kaise different hai?

options.A: Liquid highlighter sirf oily skin ke liye hai
options.B: Liquid highlighter zyada intense glow deta hai aur dry skin ke liye better hai
options.C: Powder highlighter zyada natural dikhta hai
options.D: Liquid highlighter sirf night events ke liye hai

questions.explanation: Liquid highlighter zyada intense aur dewy glow deta hai, jo dry skin ke liye better hota hai. Powder highlighter zyada subtle shine deta hai.

questions.question: Lipstick ko long-lasting banane ke liye kaun sa step crucial hai?

options.B: Lip liner use karna aur lips ko powder se set karna

questions.explanation: Lip liner se lips ko outline aur fill karna, phir lipstick apply karke use tissue se blot karna aur thoda powder se set karna, lipstick ko long-lasting banata hai.

questions.question: Bridal makeup mein glitter eyeshadow apply karne ka best method kya hai taaki fallout na ho?

options.B: Glitter glue ya sticky base use karke flat brush se dab karna
options.D: Loose glitter ko spray se set karna

questions.explanation: Glitter fallout se bachne ke liye, pehle glitter glue ya ek sticky base apply karte hain, phir flat brush se glitter ko dab karte hain, jisse woh jagah par set ho jaata hai.

questions.question: Agar bride ki eyes hooded hain, toh kaun si eye makeup technique unke liye best hogi?

options.B: Crease ko upar ki taraf blend karna aur shimmery lid shade use karna
options.D: Only kajal on lower lash line

questions.explanation: Hooded eyes ke liye, crease ko upar ki taraf blend karte hain aur lid par shimmery ya light shade use karte hain, jisse eyes badi aur open dikhti hain.

questions.question: Contouring se face ko kaun sa effect diya jaata hai?

options.B: Defining aur sculpting effect

questions.explanation: Contouring se face features ko define aur sculpt kiya jaata hai, shadows create karke face ko slimmer ya zyada structured dikhaya jaata hai.

questions.question: Highlighter kahan apply kiya jaata hai to enhance facial features?

options.B: High points of the face (cheekbones, brow bone, nose bridge)

questions.explanation: Highlighter face ke high points jaise cheekbones, brow bone, nose bridge aur cupid's bow par apply kiya jaata hai to catch light aur features ko enhance karne ke liye.

questions.question: Ek bride ko photography ke liye makeup kar rahe hain, toh kis baat ka dhyaan rakhna chahiye?

options.A: Flash photography ke liye SPF wale products avoid karna
options.B: Heavy glitter use karna
options.D: Sirf matte finish products use karna

questions.explanation: Flash photography mein SPF wale products white cast de sakte hain, isliye unhe avoid karna chahiye. Makeup thoda sa zyada laga sakte hain kyunki camera kuch color absorb karta hai.

questions.question: Color correcting palette mein purple shade kyu hota hai?

options.A: Redness ko conceal karne ke liye
options.B: Yellowish undertones ko neutralize karne ke liye
options.C: Dark spots ko cover karne ke liye
options.D: Skin ko highlight karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Purple corrector yellowish ya sallow undertones ko neutralize karta hai, skin ko brighter aur more even dikhata hai.

questions.question: Agar bride ki eyebrows sparse hain, toh unhe define karne ke liye best approach kya hai?

options.B: Eyebrow pencil ya powder se gaps fill karna aur spoolie se blend karna
options.C: Liquid eyeliner se brows draw karna

questions.explanation: Sparse eyebrows ko define karne ke liye, eyebrow pencil ya powder se gaps fill karte hain aur phir spoolie se blend karte hain, jisse natural look milta hai.

questions.question: Faux freckles create karne ke liye kaun sa product use karna best hai?

options.B: Brow pencil ya liquid eyeliner ke light dots

questions.explanation: Faux freckles ke liye, brow pencil ya liquid eyeliner ka light brown shade use karte hain, chhote dots banate hain aur unhe fingers se dab karte hain, taaki natural lage.

questions.question: North Indian bridal look mein sabse common eye makeup style kaun sa hai?

options.B: Dramatic winged eyeliner aur heavy kajal

questions.explanation: North Indian bridal look mein dramatic winged eyeliner aur heavy kajal common hai, jo eyes ko bold aur expressive banata hai.

questions.question: South Indian bridal makeup mein gold jewellery ke saath kaun se tones zyada suit karte hain?

options.B: Warm gold, copper aur earthy tones

questions.explanation: South Indian bridal makeup mein gold jewellery ke saath warm tones jaise gold, copper, aur earthy tones zyada compliment karte hain.

questions.question: Engagement makeup look bridal makeup se kaise different hota hai?

options.A: Engagement makeup hamesha heavier hota hai
options.B: Engagement makeup generally lighter aur more subtle hota hai
options.C: Dono mein koi difference nahi hai
options.D: Engagement makeup mein sirf black color use hota hai

questions.explanation: Engagement makeup generally bridal makeup se lighter aur more subtle hota hai, kyunki yeh pre-wedding event hai aur bridal look main event ke liye reserve kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Reception makeup look ke liye kaun sa style prefer kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Glamorous, evening appropriate look with shimmer and bold lips

questions.explanation: Reception makeup look typically glamorous aur evening appropriate hota hai, jismein shimmer, bold lips aur defined eyes shamil ho sakte hain.

questions.question: Daytime outdoor wedding ke liye bridal makeup mein kis baat ka dhyaan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Light, natural-looking base aur soft, blendable colors

questions.explanation: Daytime outdoor wedding ke liye light, natural-looking base aur soft, blendable colors use karne chahiye, taaki makeup harsh na lage aur sunlight mein natural dikhe.

questions.question: Agar bride ki outfit red hai, toh uske lips ke liye kaun sa color option best hoga?

options.B: Classic red ya deep maroon

questions.explanation: Red outfit ke saath classic red ya deep maroon lips bahut acha lagte hain, jo traditional Indian bridal look ko complete karte hain.

questions.question: Mehndi event ke liye bridal makeup kaisa hona chahiye?

options.B: Lightweight, fresh aur playful look

questions.explanation: Mehndi event ke liye lightweight, fresh aur playful makeup look prefer kiya jaata hai, jo energetic aur vibrant atmosphere ko suit kare.

questions.question: Christian bridal makeup mein generally kaun sa look prefer kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Elegant, subtle aur classic look with soft eyes and nude/pink lips

questions.explanation: Christian bridal makeup mein elegant, subtle aur classic look prefer kiya jaata hai, jismein soft eyes, nude ya pink lips aur flawless base hota hai.

questions.question: Bridal makeup mein 'Draping' technique kya hai aur kyu use karte hain?

options.B: Blush ko temples tak extend karke face ko lift karne ki technique
options.C: Foundation ko apply karne ka tareeka

questions.explanation: Draping ek technique hai jismein blush ko cheekbones se temples tak extend kiya jaata hai, jisse face ko lifted aur sculpted look milta hai, especially 70s mein popular thi.

questions.question: Photoshoot ke liye bridal makeup karte samay kis lighting ko consider karna chahiye?

options.B: Studio lights, flash aur natural light ko consider karna

questions.explanation: Photoshoot ke liye studio lights, flash aur natural light ko consider karna zaroori hai, kyunki har type ki lighting mein makeup alag dikhta hai.

questions.question: Agar bride ki skin oily hai aur shaadi garmiyon mein hai, toh makeup ko set karne ke liye kaun sa product essential hai?

options.B: Mattifying setting spray aur translucent powder

questions.explanation: Oily skin aur garmiyon ki shaadi ke liye mattifying setting spray aur translucent powder essential hain, jo shine control karte hain aur makeup ko long-lasting banate hain.

questions.question: Western bridal makeup mein generally kaun sa lip color prefer kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Bright fuchsias

questions.explanation: Western bridal makeup mein nude, soft pinks ya mauves jaise subtle lip colors prefer kiye jaate hain, jo elegant aur timeless look dete hain.

questions.question: Bridal makeup mein jewelry aur outfit ke colors ko harmonize karna kyu zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf makeup artist ki choice ke liye
options.B: Ek cohesive aur balanced overall look create karne ke liye
options.C: Bride ko confuse karne ke liye
options.D: Makeup ko zyada expensive dikhane ke liye

questions.explanation: Jewelry aur outfit ke colors ko harmonize karna ek cohesive aur balanced overall bridal look create karne ke liye zaroori hai, taaki sab kuch perfect lage.

questions.question: Agar bride ka lehenga pastel shade ka hai, toh uske eye makeup ke liye kya suggestion hoga?

options.B: Soft, shimmery pastels ya neutral tones

questions.explanation: Pastel lehenga ke saath soft, shimmery pastels ya neutral tones ka eye makeup best rehta hai, jo outfit ko compliment karta hai aur look ko balanced rakhta hai.

questions.question: Bridal makeup mein bindi ka role kya hai?

options.B: Traditional aur cultural significance, jo look ko complete karta hai
options.C: Forehead ko cover karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Bindi ka traditional aur cultural significance hai, aur yeh Indian bridal look ko complete karta hai, ek aesthetic touch deta hai.

questions.question: Bridal makeup trial kyu important hai?

options.A: Sirf makeup artist ko practise karne ke liye
options.B: Bride aur makeup artist ko final look discuss aur finalize karne ke liye, aur allergies check karne ke liye
options.C: Makeup products ko test karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Bridal makeup trial bride aur makeup artist ko final look discuss aur finalize karne, allergies check karne aur ensure karne mein help karta hai ki wedding day par sab kuch smooth ho.

questions.question: Agar bride ka event evening mein hai aur low light setup hai, toh makeup mein kis baat par focus karenge?

options.B: Intense contouring, shimmer aur bold features

questions.explanation: Evening low light events ke liye, intense contouring, shimmer aur bold features use karte hain, kyunki low light mein makeup thoda dull lag sakta hai, aur features ko enhance karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Bridal updo banane ke liye kaun sa tool sabse essential hai?

options.B: Curling wand

questions.explanation: Updo banane ke liye bobby pins aur hairspray sabse essential hain, jo hair ko secure aur set karne mein help karte hain.

questions.question: Agar bride ke baal thin hain, toh unhe voluminous dikhane ke liye kaun si technique use karenge?

options.A: Backcombing ya teasing at the roots
options.B: Zyada hair oil lagana

questions.explanation: Thin hair ko voluminous dikhane ke liye roots par backcombing ya teasing karna effective hota hai, jo lift aur fullness provide karta hai.

questions.question: Open curls ko long-lasting banane ke liye kaun sa product use karna chahiye?

options.B: Heat protectant spray aur strong hold hairspray

questions.explanation: Open curls ko long-lasting banane ke liye heat protectant spray (curling se pehle) aur strong hold hairspray (curling ke baad) use karna chahiye.

questions.question: French braid aur Dutch braid mein kya difference hai?

options.B: French braid mein strands upar se cross hote hain, Dutch braid mein neeche se
options.C: Dutch braid sirf short hair ke liye hai
options.D: French braid zyada loose hoti hai

questions.explanation: French braid mein hair strands upar se cross hote hain, jisse braid 'inside' lagti hai. Dutch braid mein strands neeche se cross hote hain, jisse braid 'puffed up' aur 'outside' dikhti hai.

questions.question: Hair extensions apply karne se pehle kaun sa step zaroori hai?

options.B: Hair ko clean aur dry karna, aur section karna

questions.explanation: Hair extensions apply karne se pehle hair ko clean, dry aur ache se section karna zaroori hai, taaki extensions evenly aur securely lag sake.

questions.question: Traditional Indian bridal bun mein kaun sa accessory common hai?

options.B: Gajra (fresh flowers)

questions.explanation: Traditional Indian bridal bun mein gajra (fresh flowers) ka use bahut common hai, jo look ko elegant aur fragrant banata hai.

questions.question: Agar bride ka forehead broad hai, toh kaun sa hairstyle uske liye suitable hoga?

options.B: Front fringes ya side-swept bangs
options.C: High bun with no hair on forehead

questions.explanation: Broad forehead ko balance karne ke liye front fringes ya side-swept bangs suitable hote hain, jo forehead ko partially cover karte hain.

questions.question: Hair styling mein heat protectant spray kyu use karte hain?

options.A: Hair ko shiny banane ke liye
options.B: Hair ko heat damage se protect karne ke liye
options.C: Hair ko sticky banane ke liye
options.D: Hair ko oil-free banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Heat protectant spray hair ko curling iron, straightener jaise heat styling tools se hone wale damage se bachata hai.

questions.question: Messy bun banane ke liye kaun si technique use ki jaati hai?

options.B: Hair ko loose gather karke, twist karke aur pins se secure karna
options.C: Hair ko bahut zyada hairspray lagakar

questions.explanation: Messy bun banane ke liye hair ko loose gather karte hain, twist karte hain aur phir pins se casually secure karte hain, jisse effortless look milta hai.

questions.question: Bridal hairstyle mein hair accessories (maang tikka, jhoomar) ko kaise secure karte hain?

options.B: Bobby pins, clips aur hairspray se

questions.explanation: Hair accessories ko bobby pins, clips aur hairspray se secure karte hain, taaki woh jagah par rahein aur poore event mein na girein.

questions.question: Waterfall braid kya hai?

options.B: Ek braid jismein hair strands waterfall ki tarah girte hain
options.C: Ek braid jo sirf neeche banti hai
options.D: Ek braid jismein koi hair drop nahi hota

questions.explanation: Waterfall braid ek unique braid hai jismein har section ke baad ek strand ko drop kiya jaata hai, jo waterfall ka illusion deta hai.

questions.question: Agar bride ki neck short hai, toh kaun sa hairstyle uske liye flattering hoga?

options.B: Low bun at the nape of the neck

questions.explanation: Short neck wali bride ke liye high updo ya high ponytail flattering hota hai, kyunki yeh neck ko lamba dikhata hai aur overall silhouette ko elegant banata hai.

questions.question: Bridal hairstyle mein dupatta setting kyu important hai?

options.A: Sirf dupatta ko cover karne ke liye
options.B: Dupatta ko secure karna aur hairstyle ke saath integrate karna
options.C: Hair ko damage karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Dupatta setting important hai taaki dupatta secure rahe aur hairstyle ke saath seamlessly integrate ho, jisse bridal look complete ho.

questions.question: Voluminous curls create karne ke liye kaun se size ka curling barrel use karna chahiye?

options.B: Large barrel (1.5-2 inch)

questions.explanation: Voluminous curls ke liye large barrel (1.5-2 inch) ka curling wand use karna chahiye, jo soft, bouncy curls deta hai.

questions.question: Bridal hair styling mein hairspray ka primary function kya hai?

options.B: Hairstyle ko set aur hold karna

questions.explanation: Hairspray ka primary function hairstyle ko set aur hold karna hai, taaki woh poore event mein intact rahe.

questions.question: Agar bride ke baal bahut frizzy hain, toh hair styling se pehle kaun sa product use karna chahiye?

options.B: Anti-frizz serum ya smoothing cream

questions.explanation: Frizzy hair ke liye anti-frizz serum ya smoothing cream use karna chahiye, jo frizz ko control karta hai aur hair ko smooth banata hai.

questions.question: Bridal hairstyle mein hair padding kyu use ki jaati hai?

options.A: Hair ko protect karne ke liye
options.B: Volume aur shape add karne ke liye, especially buns aur updos mein
options.C: Hair ko color karne ke liye
options.D: Hair ko straight karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Hair padding buns aur updos mein volume aur shape add karne ke liye use ki jaati hai, jisse hairstyle fuller aur more structured dikhta hai.

questions.question: Client consultation mein sabse pehla step kya hona chahiye?

options.B: Bride ki preferences, skin type aur outfit ke baare mein discuss karna

questions.explanation: Client consultation mein bride ki preferences, skin type aur outfit ke baare mein discuss karna sabse pehla aur zaroori step hai, taaki uski expectations ko samjha ja sake.

questions.question: Apna bridal makeup portfolio kaise build karenge?

options.B: High-quality photos aur videos of your best work ko compile karke
options.C: Dusre artists ka kaam copy karke

questions.explanation: Ek strong bridal makeup portfolio banane ke liye high-quality photos aur videos of your best work ko compile karna zaroori hai, jisse aapki skills showcase ho sakein.

questions.question: Social media par apni services ko promote karne ka best tareeka kya hai?

options.A: Sirf apni personal photos post karna
options.B: High-quality bridal makeup looks, behind-the-scenes, aur client testimonials share karna

questions.explanation: Social media par high-quality bridal makeup looks, behind-the-scenes content, aur client testimonials share karna effective hai, jisse audience engage hoti hai.

questions.question: Bridal makeup packages mein kya shamil ho sakta hai?

options.B: Makeup, hair styling, dupatta setting, jewellery setting aur pre-bridal trial

questions.explanation: Bridal makeup packages mein makeup, hair styling, dupatta setting, jewellery setting aur pre-bridal trial jaise comprehensive services shamil ho sakte hain.

questions.question: Client se initial inquiry ke baad follow-up kyu important hai?

options.B: Unki queries resolve karne aur booking confirm karne ke liye
options.C: Sirf apna time pass karne ke liye
options.D: Unko dusre artists ke paas bhej dena

questions.explanation: Initial inquiry ke baad follow-up karna zaroori hai, taaki client ki queries resolve ho sakein aur booking confirm ki ja sake, professional service provide karne ke liye.

questions.question: Apni services ke liye pricing kaise set karenge?

options.A: Sirf dusre artists ko copy karke
options.B: Apne experience, skill level, product cost aur market rates ko consider karke
options.C: Randomly koi bhi price rakh dena

questions.explanation: Pricing set karte samay apne experience, skill level, product cost aur current market rates ko consider karna chahiye, taaki competitive aur fair pricing ho.

questions.question: Ek upset client ko kaise handle karenge?

options.B: Unki baat patiently sunna, empathy dikhana aur solution offer karna

questions.explanation: Upset client ko handle karne ke liye, unki baat patiently sunna, empathy dikhana aur unki concern ko address karte hue solution offer karna professional approach hai.

questions.question: Word-of-mouth marketing bridal makeup business ke liye kyu powerful hai?

options.B: Trusted recommendations naye clients ko attract karti hain

questions.explanation: Word-of-mouth marketing powerful hai kyunki trusted recommendations naye clients ko attract karti hain, jo personal experience par based hoti hain.

questions.question: Apne client base ko expand karne ke liye kaun si strategy use kar sakte hain?

options.A: Sirf ek hi client par focus karna
options.B: Networking with wedding planners, photographers, aur other vendors

questions.explanation: Client base expand karne ke liye wedding planners, photographers, aur other vendors ke saath networking karna effective hai, jisse referrals milte hain.

questions.question: Bridal makeup contract mein kya shamil hona chahiye?

options.B: Services offered, pricing, payment schedule, cancellation policy, aur date/time details

questions.explanation: Bridal makeup contract mein services offered, pricing, payment schedule, cancellation policy, aur date/time details shamil honi chahiye, taaki dono parties ke expectations clear hon.

questions.question: Apni skills ko update rakhne ke liye kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Ek baar course karke chhod dena
options.B: New trends, techniques aur products par research karna, workshops attend karna

questions.explanation: Skills ko update rakhne ke liye new trends, techniques aur products par research karna aur workshops attend karna zaroori hai, taaki aap competitive bane rahein.

questions.question: Bridal makeup trial ke dauran client se feedback lena kyu important hai?

options.B: Unki preferences ko confirm karna aur adjustments karna
options.C: Sirf time pass karne ke liye
options.D: Unko apne decisions par doubt karana

questions.explanation: Trial ke dauran client se feedback lena important hai taaki unki preferences ko confirm kiya ja sake aur zaroori adjustments kiye ja sake, ensuring satisfaction.

questions.question: Apni availability aur bookings ko effectively manage karne ke liye kya use karenge?

options.B: Digital calendar, booking software ya ek physical diary
options.C: Dusre logon ko yaad rakhne ke liye kehna

questions.explanation: Availability aur bookings ko effectively manage karne ke liye digital calendar, booking software ya ek physical diary use karna chahiye, taaki koi booking miss na ho.

questions.question: Professional boundaries set karna kyu important hai client ke saath?

options.A: Client ko dur rakhne ke liye
options.B: Respect maintain karne aur professional relationship banaye rakhne ke liye
options.C: Apne aap ko superior dikhane ke liye
options.D: Services ko limit karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Professional boundaries set karna respect maintain karne aur professional relationship banaye rakhne ke liye important hai, jisse client aur artist dono comfortable feel karein.

questions.question: Bridal makeup artist ke liye travel expenses ko pricing mein kaise include karna chahiye?

options.B: Per kilometer charge ya flat travel fee add karna

questions.explanation: Travel expenses ko pricing mein include karne ke liye per kilometer charge ya ek flat travel fee add karna chahiye, taaki aapki costs cover ho sakein.

questions.question: Online presence build karne ke liye aur kya karna chahiye besides social media?

options.B: Ek professional website ya Google My Business profile create karna
options.C: Kisi aur ki website copy karna

questions.explanation: Online presence build karne ke liye ek professional website ya Google My Business profile create karna zaroori hai, jisse aapki visibility badhti hai aur clients aapko easily search kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Makeup brushes ko sanitize karna kyu zaroori hai after every client?

options.A: Sirf unhe naya dikhane ke liye
options.B: Bacteria aur germs ke spread ko rokne ke liye
options.C: Unki life kam karne ke liye
options.D: Makeup ko smooth banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Makeup brushes ko har client ke baad sanitize karna zaroori hai, taaki bacteria aur germs ke spread ko roka ja sake aur cross-contamination na ho.

questions.question: Makeup products ko store karte samay kis baat ka dhyaan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Cool, dry place par store karna aur expiration dates check karna

questions.explanation: Makeup products ko cool, dry place par store karna aur expiration dates check karna zaroori hai, taaki unki shelf life maintain rahe aur woh kharab na ho.

questions.question: Makeup artist ko apne tools ko kaise sterilize karna chahiye?

options.B: Alcohol solution ya UV sterilizer use karna for non-porous tools

questions.explanation: Non-porous tools jaise spatulas, tweezers ko alcohol solution ya UV sterilizer se sterilize karna chahiye, taaki pathogens eliminate ho sakein.

questions.question: Client confidentiality kyu important hai bridal makeup business mein?

options.A: Client ki personal details share karna
options.B: Client ki trust maintain karna aur unki personal information ko private rakhna
options.D: Apni branding ke liye client ki photos bina permission use karna

questions.explanation: Client confidentiality important hai taaki client ki trust maintain rahe aur unki personal information private rahe, jo professional ethics ka hissa hai.

questions.question: Agar client ko kisi product se allergic reaction ho jaye, toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Immediately product remove karna, area clean karna aur medical advice recommend karna

questions.explanation: Allergic reaction hone par immediately product remove karna, affected area clean karna aur medical advice recommend karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Cross-contamination se bachne ke liye kya precautions leni chahiye?

options.B: Disposable applicators use karna aur product ko direct container se na lena
options.C: Ek hi sponge sab clients par use karna

questions.explanation: Cross-contamination se bachne ke liye disposable applicators use karna aur product ko direct container se na lena (spatula use karna) zaroori hai.

questions.question: Makeup artist ko apne workspace ko kaise clean rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Regularly surfaces clean aur sanitize karna, waste dispose karna

questions.explanation: Makeup artist ko apne workspace ko regularly clean aur sanitize karna chahiye, aur waste ko properly dispose karna chahiye, taaki hygiene maintain rahe.

questions.question: Professional ethics mein 'Punctuality' kyu important hai?

options.A: Sirf time pass karne ke liye
options.B: Client ki trust aur respect earn karne ke liye
options.C: Client ko wait karwane ke liye
options.D: Apne aap ko busy dikhane ke liye

questions.explanation: Punctuality client ki trust aur respect earn karne ke liye important hai, aur yeh professional conduct ka ek key aspect hai.

questions.question: Agar client late ho jaye, toh makeup artist ko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Patiently wait karna, aur agar possible ho toh schedule adjust karna ya extra charges discuss karna

questions.explanation: Agar client late ho jaye, toh patiently wait karna aur agar possible ho toh schedule adjust karna ya extra charges discuss karna professional approach hai.

questions.question: Bridal makeup artist ke liye insurance lena kyu important ho sakta hai?

options.A: Sirf paisa kharch karne ke liye
options.B: Accidents, damage ya lawsuits se protect hone ke liye
options.C: Apne friends ko impress karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Professional liability insurance accidents, damage ya lawsuits se protect hone ke liye important hai, jo business risks ko cover karta hai.

questions.question: Product shelf life ko kaise check karte hain?

options.B: PAO (Period After Opening) symbol aur manufacturing date check karke

questions.explanation: Product shelf life ko PAO (Period After Opening) symbol (ek open jar icon jismein number aur M likha hota hai) aur manufacturing date check karke pata karte hain.

questions.question: Professional makeup artist ko apne appearance aur hygiene ka kyu dhyaan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Professional image maintain karne aur client trust build karne ke liye
options.C: Client ko impress karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Professional makeup artist ko apne appearance aur hygiene ka dhyaan rakhna chahiye, jo professional image maintain karta hai aur client trust build karta hai.

questions.question: Agar client ki skin par koi contagious skin condition (jaise cold sore) hai, toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Service refuse karna ya reschedule karna jab tak condition clear na ho
options.C: Sirf us area ko ignore karna

questions.explanation: Contagious skin condition hone par service refuse karna ya reschedule karna chahiye, taaki infection ka spread roka ja sake aur client ki health ko compromise na kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Makeup artist ko emergency contact numbers kyu rakhne chahiye?

options.A: Sirf time pass karne ke liye
options.B: Medical emergencies ya unforeseen situations ke liye
options.C: Client ko call karne ke liye
options.D: Apni contacts list badhane ke liye

questions.explanation: Emergency contact numbers medical emergencies ya unforeseen situations ke liye rakhne chahiye, taaki zaroorat padne par turant madad mil sake.

questions.question: Client ko makeup removal aur aftercare tips dena kyu zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf unko busy rakhne ke liye
options.B: Skin health maintain karne aur next day glow ke liye
options.D: Apni skills show karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Client ko makeup removal aur aftercare tips dena zaroori hai, taaki unki skin health maintain rahe aur woh next day bhi glow karein.

questions.question: Agar ek product kharab ho gaya hai (smell, texture change), toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Immediately dispose karna
options.C: Usse theek karne ki koshish karna

questions.explanation: Agar koi product kharab ho gaya hai (smell, texture change), toh use immediately dispose karna chahiye, kyunki yeh skin irritation ya infection cause kar sakta hai.
